title: epipactis leptochila subsp. aspromontana
intro: Epipactis leptochila subsp. aspromontana is a rare species of orchid native to the Mediterranean region. It belongs to the genus Epipactis, a group of terrestrial orchids commonly known as hellebores of the woods due to their similar appearance and growth habit. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which may contribute to its use in treating various health issues. Herbal preparations of Epipactis leptochila subsp. aspromontana are often used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation.
